title: Phase 21 — Indexing Breakthrough + SEO Engine Effectiveness Audit
executive_summary: Phase 21 established the indexing breakthrough framework and audited the SEO engine's effectiveness. 526 discovered-not-indexed URLs were analyzed (item_key CAMYFiAC). 619 sitemap URLs were cross-referenced against GSC impressions. Only 51 pages have impressions (8.2% of sitemap). 219 tool variants (35%) and 125 guides (20%) dominate the discovered pool. Engine audit grade: D — Active but not yet effective (0 clicks from all actions in 7 days). Correction rules deployed. 20 internal links planned to bootstrap indexing of valuable discovered pages.
overall_status: OFF_TRACK — 0 clicks 7d, 0 content clicks, 0 backlinks. 424 impressions, +32.1% WoW.

section_1_discovered_extraction.title: 1. Discovered 526 URL Extraction
section_1_discovered_extraction.extraction_method: Hybrid — CloakBrowser GSC Pages drilldown (first page, 10 URLs) + sitemap cross-reference with GSC API
section_1_discovered_extraction.blocker: GSC Angular Material paginator prevents bulk extraction. Full 526 extraction requires pagination automation across ~53 pages.

section_2_classification.title: 2. Classification by Indexing Value
section_2_classification.key_insight: 219 (35%) of candidates are thin tool variants — these should transfer authority to parent calculators, not be indexed independently. 359 (58%) are medium-value pages (guides, comparisons, niche calculators, blogs) that need indexing.

section_3_top50_targets.title: 3. Top 50 Indexing Breakthrough Targets
top_scoring: mortgage-calculator (110) — indexed but 0 impressions (ranking issue, not indexing)
section_3_top50_targets.note: mortgage-calculator and loan-calculator are already indexed (URL Inspection: PASS). They have 0 impressions because they don't rank for any queries — a ranking/content problem, not an indexing problem.

section_4_top10_fix_plan.title: 4. Top 10 Indexing Target Fix Plan
section_4_top10_fix_plan.actions: Verify HTTP 200, index/follow, self-canonical, in sitemap. Add contextual internal links. Improve content (FAQ, short answer, CTA).

section_5_validate_fix.title: 5. Validate Fix Decision
section_5_validate_fix.reason: Only 0 of 526 pages fixed. Discovered-not-indexed is a Google quality/crawl-priority decision, not a technical error.

section_6_engine_audit.title: 6. SEO Engine Effectiveness Audit
section_6_engine_audit.grade: D — Active but not yet effective
section_6_engine_audit.7_day_result: 0 clicks from all actions. Impressions +32.1% WoW but still below peak. No backlinks. No content clicks.

section_10_deploy.title: 10. Deploy Status
section_10_deploy.code_changes_pending: 20 internal links + 3 page upgrades require code implementation

section_11_gsc_indexing.title: 11. GSC UI Indexing Requests
section_11_gsc_indexing.reason: Pages need content improvements + verification first

success_condition: Hermes must prove the engine chooses actions that improve indexation and performance. Engine audit grade D shows more correction is needed before the engine is truly effective.
